focus_points.label: Post-launch win and how it landed
focus_points.reason: Priya shipped a major feature on Monday and the team noticed; worth clarifying whether the quiet week is normal recovery or a sign something still feels unresolved after the launch.

focus_points.label: Why she’s quieter with the team this week
focus_points.reason: Priya has been quieter this week; one possibility is post-launch recovery, but it’s worth clarifying whether it’s about team dynamics, confidence in the next steps, or something she hasn’t said out loud yet.

focus_points.label: Mentoring thread — what she expects now
focus_points.reason: What she wants from you that she hasn’t asked for. At Senior level, mentoring plans often stall when ownership and timing aren’t explicit—use this check-in to get the thread moving again.

focus_points.label: Next-quarter ownership before the billing rewrite
focus_points.reason: What she’s saying yes and no to, and whether her next-quarter sequencing is compatible with the billing rewrite. This helps you avoid introducing change while she’s already forming plans that will get disrupted.
